description: A player agrees to be 'mic'd up' for a game, wearing a microphone to capture on-field audio for a broadcast segment.

title: 13683_manage_suite_access_list
description: A corporate suite holder needs to provide a list of guests who will be attending the game and need access to the suite.

title: 13684_handle_visa_for_international_game
description: A team is scheduled to play a game in another country. The travel manager must ensure all players and staff have the necessary visas.

title: 13685_handle_championship_trophy_presentation
description: After the championship game, a league official must coordinate the on-field trophy presentation ceremony.

title: 13686_create_a_fan_loyalty_challenge
description: A marketing manager wants to create a challenge in the mobile app where fans earn extra loyalty points for attending three consecutive home games.

title: 13687_handle_breaking_news_in_broadcast
description: During a pre-game show, major breaking news happens (e.g., a star player is unexpectedly traded). The producer must immediately incorporate it into the show.

title: 13688_manage_power_outage_at_stadium
description: A power outage occurs at the stadium during a game, affecting the lights and scoreboards.

title: 13689_handle_player_waived
description: A team decides to release a player from their contract. The GM must place the player on waivers.

title: 13690_award_championship_rings
description: After winning a championship, a team needs to design and order championship rings for all players and staff.

title: 13691_handle_stolen_ticket_report
description: A fan reports that their physical tickets for a game were stolen.

title: 13692_archive_game_broadcast
description: After a game broadcast is complete, the full recording must be archived for future use.

title: 13693_coordinate_championship_parade
description: After winning a championship, a team needs to work with the city to plan a championship parade.

title: 13495_dispatch_emergency_services_to_traffic_accident
description: An automated incident detection system reports a multi-vehicle collision. An operator must dispatch the appropriate emergency units.

title: 13500_investigate_gunshot_detection_alert
description: Acoustic sensors detect a gunshot in a public park. An operator must verify the threat and dispatch police.

title: 13505_coordinate_response_to_flash_flood
description: Heavy rainfall has caused flash flooding. An operator must manage the disaster response.

title: 13510_deploy_preventative_patrols_based_on_crime_prediction
description: The system predicts a high likelihood of vehicle break-ins in a specific area. An operator must deploy police patrols as a deterrent.

title: 13515_manage_crowd_at_a_public_protest
description: A large, unplanned protest is forming. An operator must monitor crowd size and density to ensure public safety.

title: 13520_generate_evacuation_route_during_wildfire
description: A wildfire is approaching a residential area. An operator must generate and broadcast a safe evacuation route.

title: 13525_locate_a_missing_person_with_a_smart_watch
description: A family reports an elderly person with dementia as missing. The person is wearing a city-registered GPS smart watch.

title: 13530_identify_suspicious_loitering_near_critical_infrastructure
description: Camera analytics detect a person loitering near a reservoir's perimeter fence for an extended period.

title: 13535_cross-reference_stolen_vehicle_report
description: A police department reports a stolen vehicle. An operator must check the city's license plate reader network for sightings.

title: 13540_deploy_mobile_camera_unit_for_special_event
description: For a weekend festival, an operator needs to deploy a temporary, mobile camera trailer to monitor the event grounds.

title: 13545_review_footage_for_a_criminal_investigation
description: Police request video footage from a specific intersection for a time period following a reported robbery.

title: 13550_manage_police_response_to_bank_alarm
description: A silent alarm is triggered at a downtown bank. An operator must coordinate the police response.

title: 13555_manage_hazmat_spill_incident
description: A truck has overturned, spilling a hazardous chemical. An operator must coordinate a multi-agency response.

title: 13560_identify_crime_pattern_using_predictive_analytics
description: An analyst uses the system to find a pattern in a series of recent commercial burglaries.

title: 13565_monitor_a_person_of_interest_with_a_geofence
description: Police have a person of interest under surveillance and want to be alerted if they enter a sensitive area.

title: 13570_provide_first_responders_with_building_entry_codes
description: Firefighters responding to an alarm at a commercial building need the entry codes to get inside.

title: 13575_manage_road_closures_for_a_marathon
description: An operator must implement and manage all road closures for the annual city marathon.

title: 13580_analyze_response_time_for_emergency_services
description: A fire chief wants a report on the department's average response time over the last year to see if they are meeting their goals.

title: 13585_manage_security_for_a_vip_visit
description: A foreign dignitary is visiting. An operator must monitor their motorcade's route and ensure its security.

title: 13590_track_stolen_city_asset
description: A GPS tracker on a valuable city-owned asset (like a high-end mower from the parks department) indicates it has left its designated area.

title: 13497_respond_to_citizen_report_of_a_broken_streetlight
description: A citizen reports a broken streetlight via the city's mobile app. An operator must create a work order for the repair.

title: 13502_issue_an_air_quality_alert
description: Environmental sensors report a spike in airborne pollutants. An operator must issue a public health alert.

title: 13507_track_a_building_permit_application
description: A citizen calls to check the status of their building permit application. An operator must look it up and provide an update.

title: 13512_schedule_predictive_maintenance_for_a_bridge
description: The asset management system, based on sensor data and age, predicts that a bridge's expansion joints will need service soon.

title: 13517_manage_graffiti_removal_request
description: A citizen reports graffiti on a public building. An operator dispatches a cleaning crew.

title: 13522_process_a_business_license_renewal
description: A small business owner has submitted an online application to renew their business license. An operator must process it.

title: 13527_notify_residents_of_road_closure_for_a_parade
description: The city has approved a parade. An operator must notify residents and businesses along the route of upcoming road closures.

title: 13532_update_public_asset_inventory
description: A new public park has been completed. An operator must add the new assets (benches, playground equipment) to the city's asset management system.

title: 13537_find_location_of_a_city-owned_asset
description: A public works employee needs to find the exact location of a specific piece of equipment (e.g., a mobile generator) for deployment.

title: 13542_handle_request_for_bulk_waste_pickup
description: A citizen requests a special pickup for large items (e.g., furniture, appliances) via the city's service portal.

title: 13547_process_a_film_permit_application
description: A film production company applies for a permit to film on a city street, requiring temporary road closures.

title: 13552_route_citizen_complaint_to_correct_department
description: A citizen submits a vague complaint about a 'mess' in a park. The agent must interpret the request and route it to the right department.

title: 13557_disseminate_information_about_a_missing_child_(amber_alert)
description: Police issue an Amber Alert for a missing child. An operator must broadcast the alert across the city's communication channels.

title: 13562_check_status_of_a_pothole_repair
description: A citizen who previously reported a pothole calls to check on the status of the repair.

title: 13567_retire_an_old_public_asset
description: A public fountain is being decommissioned. An operator must update the city's asset records.

title: 13572_close_permit_after_final_inspection
description: A building inspector has completed the final inspection for a new home and marked it as 'Passed'. An operator must close out the permit.

title: 13577_find_nearest_public_restroom
description: A tourist uses a city information kiosk to find the nearest available public restroom.

title: 13582_update_asset_record_after_repair
description: A maintenance crew has just repaired a broken water pump. An operator must update the asset's records.

title: 13587_analyze_citizen_report_trends
description: A city manager wants to know what the most common citizen complaints have been over the last year.

title: 13592_provide_information_on_voting_locations
description: On election day, a citizen calls the city's information line to find their assigned polling station.

title: 13498_adjust_building_hvac_for_energy_demand_response_event
description: The utility has called a demand response event. An operator must reduce energy consumption in a city-owned building.

title: 13503_remotely_dim_streetlights_for_energy_savings
description: During late-night hours, an operator needs to dim streetlights in a commercial district to save energy.

title: 13508_investigate_bridge_structural_health_alert
description: Sensors on a major bridge have detected abnormal stress levels after a minor earthquake.

title: 13513_simulate_impact_of_new_development_using_digital_twin
description: A developer has proposed a new high-rise building. A city planner uses the digital twin to assess its impact on traffic and solar access.

title: 13518_identify_faulty_streetlight
description: The smart lighting system reports that a specific streetlight is consuming no power, indicating a fault.

title: 13523_authorize_access_to_a_secure_facility
description: A contractor needs temporary access to a secure room in a city building. An operator must grant them access for a specific time window.

title: 13528_analyze_digital_twin_for_emergency_vehicle_access
description: A fire chief wants to know if a new ladder truck can access a narrow street and deploy its ladder to reach a specific building.

title: 13533_investigate_fire_alarm_at_city_library
description: A fire alarm is triggered at the city library after hours. An operator must verify the alarm and dispatch the fire department.

title: 13538_analyze_and_report_on_building_energy_use
description: A sustainability officer requests a report on the energy consumption of all city-owned buildings for the last year.

title: 13543_check_status_of_a_bridge_de-icing_system
description: With freezing temperatures forecasted, an operator must ensure the heating elements on a critical bridge are operational.

title: 13548_detect_fault_in_tunnel_ventilation_system
description: A sensor in a traffic tunnel's ventilation system reports a fan malfunction.

title: 13553_use_digital_twin_to_plan_tree_planting
description: A city planner wants to plant new trees and uses the digital twin to ensure they won't conflict with underground utilities.

title: 13558_adjust_lighting_based_on_occupancy
description: In a city office building, an operator links occupancy sensors to the lighting system to automatically turn off lights in empty rooms.

title: 13563_report_faulty_streetlight_to_utility
description: A city-owned smart streetlight is malfunctioning, but the issue is with the power supply, not the light itself. The operator must report this to the electric utility.

title: 13568_check_elevator_status_after_power_surge
description: After a power surge, an operator must check the status of all elevators in city-owned buildings to ensure none are stuck.

title: 13573_investigate_bridge_over-height_vehicle_alert
description: Sensors on a low-clearance bridge detect a vehicle that is too tall to pass safely. An operator must intervene.

title: 13578_manage_access_for_a_scheduled_event_at_a_rec_center
description: A community group has booked a room at a recreation center. An operator must ensure the doors are unlocked for them at the scheduled time.

title: 13583_simulate_blast_radius_in_digital_twin
description: In a training exercise, an emergency planner wants to simulate the impact of an explosion at a chemical plant to plan for evacuations.

title: 13588_detect_open_window_in_a_secure_building_after_hours
description: A sensor in a secure city office building detects that a window was left open after the building has closed.

title: 13593_monitor_bridge_traffic_for_structural_analysis
description: Structural engineers need to know the weight of vehicles that have crossed a bridge to calibrate their structural health models.

title: 13494_adaptive_traffic_signal_control_for_congestion
description: An operator needs to respond to a sudden traffic jam on a major arterial road by adjusting traffic signal timing.

title: 13499_reroute_public_bus_due_to_road_closure
description: An unplanned road closure requires an operator to reroute an in-service public bus and notify passengers.

title: 13504_manage_parking_for_a_major_event
description: A major concert is scheduled. An operator must update dynamic parking signs to guide attendees to available lots.

title: 13509_identify_offline_ev_charging_station
description: A citizen reports that an EV charging station is not working. An operator needs to verify the status and dispatch a technician.

title: 13514_adjust_public_transit_schedule_for_holiday
description: For an upcoming public holiday, an operator needs to switch the entire bus and train network to a 'Sunday' service schedule.

title: 13519_implement_dynamic_pricing_for_parking
description: To manage demand, an operator implements dynamic pricing for a downtown parking garage where prices increase as occupancy rises.

title: 13524_analyze_e-scooter_usage_patterns
description: A city planner wants to understand where shared e-scooters are most frequently used to plan for new bike lanes.

title: 13529_clear_traffic_for_an_approaching_ambulance
description: An ambulance is transporting a critical patient and is stuck in traffic. An operator must create a 'green wave' by adjusting traffic lights.

title: 13534_detect_and_report_accident_blocking_bus_lane
description: An operator must identify a vehicle accident blocking a dedicated bus lane and alert transit operations.

title: 13539_dispatch_bus_to_address_overcrowding
description: Passenger counting sensors show a bus on a popular route is dangerously overcrowded. An operator must dispatch a supplementary bus.

title: 13544_identify_abandoned_e-scooter
description: A shared e-scooter has not moved in 72 hours, indicating it may be lost, stolen, or broken. An operator must investigate.

title: 13549_analyze_impact_of_a_new_bike_lane
description: A new protected bike lane was recently installed. A planner wants to see its impact on traffic speed and cyclist volume.

title: 13554_prioritize_snowplow_routes
description: After a heavy snowfall, an operator must prioritize snowplow routes, starting with major roads and bus routes.

title: 13559_manage_rebalancing_of_a_bike_share_system
description: Data shows that all bike share docks in a residential area are full, while docks in the downtown area are empty. An operator must rebalance the system.

title: 13564_detect_pedestrian_jaywalking_hotspot
description: An analyst reviews camera footage to identify locations where pedestrians frequently cross the street unsafely, suggesting the need for a new crosswalk.

title: 13569_analyze_bus_schedule_adherence
description: The transit manager wants a report on which bus routes most frequently run late.

title: 13574_analyze_parking_violation_hotspots
description: A parking enforcement manager wants to know which areas have the most parking violations to better allocate enforcement officers.

title: 13579_detect_wrong-way_driver_on_highway
description: Sensors and cameras on a highway detect a vehicle traveling in the wrong direction. An operator must take immediate action.

title: 13584_adjust_bus_headways_based_on_real-time_demand
description: Passenger demand on a certain route is higher than usual. An operator increases bus frequency to reduce wait times.

title: 13589_find_an_open_handicapped_parking_space
description: A user with a disability uses the city app to find the nearest available handicapped parking space.

title: 13496_optimize_waste_collection_route
description: An operator needs to generate an optimized collection route for a waste management truck based on real-time smart bin fill levels.

title: 13501_detect_and_locate_water_main_break
description: Flow sensors in the water network indicate a significant pressure drop, suggesting a major leak or main break.

title: 13506_balance_electrical_grid_during_heatwave
description: A heatwave is causing record electricity demand. An operator must prevent a blackout by balancing the grid.

title: 13511_investigate_noise_complaint_using_sensors
description: A citizen files a late-night noise complaint. An operator uses noise sensors to verify and identify the source.

title: 13516_restore_power_after_localized_outage
description: A transformer fails, causing a power outage in a residential neighborhood. An operator must use FLISR to restore power.

title: 13521_check_water_quality_after_contamination_alert
description: An upstream sensor detects a potential contaminant. An operator must check downstream sensors to see if it has reached the public water supply.

title: 13526_identify_source_of_illegal_dumping_in_waterway
description: A water quality sensor detects an illegal chemical discharge into a river. An operator must trace the source.

title: 13531_reroute_wastewater_flow_to_prevent_overflow
description: During a heavy storm, a wastewater interceptor is nearing capacity. An operator must reroute flow to a storage basin to prevent a sanitary sewer overflow.

title: 13536_identify_inefficient_bins_for_relocation
description: An operator analyzes waste collection data to find smart bins that are consistently underutilized, suggesting they could be relocated.

title: 13541_manage_city-wide_irrigation_during_drought
description: Due to drought conditions, an operator must reduce water usage for irrigating public parks and green spaces.

title: 13546_correlate_power_outage_with_traffic_signal_failure
description: A series of traffic signals go dark. An operator must determine if this is related to a power grid failure.

title: 13551_schedule_street_sweeping_based_on_air_quality_data
description: To combat particulate matter pollution, an operator schedules street sweeping on roads with high dust levels detected by mobile sensors.

title: 13556_identify_unusually_high_water_consumption
description: A smart water meter reports unusually high, continuous water usage at a residence, suggesting a major leak.

title: 13561_manage_landfill_methane_gas_levels
description: Sensors at the city landfill report rising methane gas levels, requiring an operator to activate the gas flare system.

title: 13566_optimize_solar_panel_cleaning_schedule
description: An operator analyzes energy output and soiling data from solar panels on city buildings to schedule cleanings only when needed.

title: 13571_adjust_reservoir_release_for_flood_control
description: Heavy rain is forecasted, and a reservoir is already near full capacity. An operator must proactively release water to create storage capacity and prevent downstream flooding.

title: 13576_detect_gas_leak_in_utility_network
description: A methane sensor in a gas utility pipeline reports a significant leak. An operator must initiate an emergency response.

title: 13581_forecast_energy_production_from_solar_farm
description: A grid operator needs a forecast of the expected energy production from the city's main solar farm for the next day to plan other generation.

title: 13586_investigate_cause_of_widespread_air_quality_alert
description: A sudden, city-wide drop in air quality is detected. An operator must investigate the cause, suspecting a regional event like a wildfire.

title: 13591_identify_failing_electrical_transformer
description: Sensors on a transformer show its temperature is steadily rising and its oil quality is degrading, indicating it is at high risk of failure.

title: 12141_process_expense_against_matter

title: 12142_prepare_exhibits_for_motion
description: A paralegal needs to prepare and organize the exhibits that will be filed in support of a motion.

title: 12143_track_contract_renewal_date
description: An in-house legal department needs to track the renewal date of a key software license to decide whether to renew or terminate.

title: 12144_handle_new_client_intake
description: A potential client calls the firm for the first time. The intake specialist needs to gather initial information.

title: 12145_search_for_prior_art
description: Before filing a patent application, a patent agent needs to search for 'prior art' to assess the novelty of an invention.

title: 12146_check_court_rules
description: Before filing a motion, a paralegal must check the local court rules and the specific judge's rules for any special formatting or filing requirements.

title: 12147_create_ethical_wall
description: A firm takes on a new matter that is adverse to a former client. To avoid a conflict, the firm needs to create an 'ethical wall' to screen off the attorneys who worked on the former matter.

title: 12148_summarize_deposition
description: A junior lawyer needs to create a concise summary of a key witness's deposition testimony.

title: 12149_create_data_room_for_ma
description: In an M&A deal, the seller's counsel needs to set up a virtual data room (VDR) for the buyer to conduct due diligence.

title: 12150_check_on_case_appeal_status
description: A client wants to know the status of their appeal. A paralegal needs to check the appellate court's docket.

title: 12151_produce_documents_in_discovery
description: After completing a document review, a paralegal needs to produce the 'Responsive' and non-privileged documents to the opposing counsel.

title: 12152_draft_privacy_policy
description: An in-house counsel needs to draft a new privacy policy for the company's website to comply with regulations like GDPR and CCPA.

title: 12153_review_and_approve_invoice
description: A managing partner needs to review and approve an invoice from an expert witness before it can be paid.

title: 12154_prepare_for_oral_argument
description: An attorney is preparing for an oral argument before an appellate court and needs to anticipate potential questions from the judges.

title: 12155_manage_contract_versions
description: During a lengthy negotiation, multiple versions of a contract are being exchanged. A paralegal needs to manage version control.

title: 12156_clear_a_trademark_for_use
description: A client wants to use a new name for a product. An IP attorney needs to conduct a full trademark search to assess the risk of infringement.

title: 12157_draft_affidavit
description: In support of a motion, an attorney needs to draft an affidavit for a witness to sign, attesting to certain facts.

title: 12158_onboard_new_attorney
description: A new attorney is joining the firm. The practice manager needs to set them up in all firm systems.

title: 12159_respond_to_third_party_subpoena
description: A company (not a party to the lawsuit) receives a subpoena for documents. In-house counsel must manage the response.

title: 12160_create_contract_summary
description: A business executive needs a one-page summary of a long, complex contract, highlighting the key business terms.

title: 12161_request_client_documents
description: To respond to discovery, a paralegal needs to request a specific set of documents from the client.

title: 12162_analyze_brief_for_arguments
description: An attorney needs to analyze an opponent's motion brief to identify their key legal arguments in order to draft a response.

title: 12163_file_annual_report
description: A corporate paralegal needs to file a company's annual report with the Secretary of State to keep it in good standing.

title: 12164_update_case_calendar
description: A deposition has been rescheduled. A paralegal needs to update the case calendar.

title: 12165_prepare_for_meet_and_confer
description: Before filing a motion to compel, attorneys are required to 'meet and confer' to resolve a discovery dispute. An associate needs to prepare for this meeting.

title: 12166_draft_deal_announcement
description: After an M&A deal is signed, an in-house counsel needs to draft an internal announcement to all employees.

title: 12167_handle_billing_inquiry
description: A client has a question about a specific line item on their invoice. A billing coordinator needs to provide an explanation.

title: 12168_redact_and_file_document_under_seal
description: An attorney needs to file a document that contains highly confidential trade secrets, requiring it to be filed under seal.

title: 12169_respond_to_office_action
description: The USPTO has issued an Office Action refusing a trademark application. An IP attorney needs to draft a response.

title: 12170_run_final_conflicts_check
description: Just before filing a new lawsuit, a partner asks for a final conflicts check to be run, including newly added defendants.

title: 12171_bate_stamp_documents
description: A paralegal needs to apply unique Bates stamp numbers to a set of documents before producing them in discovery.

title: 12172_create_closing_checklist_for_ma
description: A corporate associate needs to create a closing checklist that details all the documents that need to be signed and actions that need to be taken to close a deal.

title: 12173_send_engagement_letter
description: After a new client agrees to retain the firm, a paralegal needs to send them the official engagement letter for signature.

title: 12174_draft_protective_order
description: In a case involving confidential information, the parties agree to a stipulated protective order to govern the handling of sensitive documents. An associate needs to draft it.

title: 12175_review_corporate_bylaws
description: A client is unsure about the process for electing a new director. In-house counsel needs to review the corporate bylaws to provide an answer.

title: 12176_check_for_liens
description: As part of a real estate transaction, a paralegal needs to perform a search to see if there are any outstanding liens on the property.

title: 12177_request_medical_records
description: In a personal injury case, a paralegal needs to request the plaintiff's medical records from a hospital.

title: 12178_write_off_uncollectible_invoice
description: After numerous attempts to collect, a firm decides to write off an old, unpaid invoice. The billing manager needs to process this.

title: 12179_summarize_new_legislation
description: A new law has been passed that affects a client's industry. An associate needs to summarize the law and its impact for the client.

title: 12180_create_settlement_agreement
description: The parties in a lawsuit have reached a settlement. An attorney needs to draft the settlement agreement to formalize the terms.

title: 12181_send_case_files_to_co_counsel
description: A firm is bringing on co-counsel for a large case and needs to share the primary case files with them.

title: 12182_file_notice_of_appearance
description: An attorney is taking over a case from a prior counsel and needs to file a notice of appearance with the court.

title: 12183_create_contract_abstraction
description: For a large portfolio of real estate leases, a paralegal needs to create 'abstractions' or summaries of each lease, extracting key data into a spreadsheet.

title: 12184_check_for_cle_compliance
description: A firm administrator needs to check the Continuing Legal Education (CLE) compliance status for all attorneys in the firm ahead of the annual reporting deadline.

title: 12185_create_a_closing_argument_outline
description: An attorney is preparing for trial and needs to create an outline for their closing argument.

title: 12186_handle_data_breach_response
description: A company has experienced a data breach. In-house counsel must coordinate the legal response.

title: 12187_create_case_budget
description: A client has requested a budget for a new litigation matter. A senior associate needs to create a phased budget.

title: 12188_organize_discovery_documents
description: A firm has received a large production of documents from the opposing party. A paralegal needs to organize them.

title: 12189_create_signature_packets
description: For a large real estate closing, a paralegal needs to prepare signature packets for each signatory with all the documents they need to sign.

title: 12190_update_firm_website_bio
description: An attorney has been promoted to partner. The marketing department needs to update their bio on the firm's website.

title: 12191_draft_demand_letter
description: A client has not been paid by a customer. An attorney needs to draft a demand letter before filing a lawsuit.

title: 12192_file_ucc_financing_statement
description: In a secured lending transaction, the lender's counsel needs to file a UCC-1 financing statement to perfect the lender's security interest in the collateral.

title: 12193_review_outside_counsel_bills
description: An in-house counsel needs to review invoices from an outside law firm for compliance with the company's billing guidelines.

title: 12194_create_trial_exhibit_list
description: In preparation for trial, a paralegal needs to create a list of all exhibits the party intends to use.

title: 12195_draft_terms_of_service
description: An in-house counsel needs to draft the Terms of Service (ToS) for a new software-as-a-service (SaaS) product.

title: 12196_close_out_ethics_review
description: After a conflicts check revealed a potential issue, the firm's ethics committee reviewed it and cleared the firm to take the case. An administrator needs to document this.

title: 12005_promote_a_story_on_social_media
description: A social media editor needs to promote a newly published investigative report across Twitter, Facebook, and Instagram.

title: 12006_moderate_a_comments_section
description: A community manager must moderate the comments section on a controversial article, removing hate speech while allowing for civil debate.

title: 12007_analyze_weekly_content_performance
description: An editor wants to review the performance of all articles published last week to understand what resonated with the audience.

title: 12008_find_an_old_article_for_a_follow-up_story
description: A reporter is writing a follow-up to a story published five years ago and needs to find the original article in the digital archive.

title: 12021_create_a_newsletter_edition
description: A newsletter editor needs to curate the top stories of the week and write a daily newsletter to be sent to subscribers.

title: 12022_respond_to_a_readers_story_correction_request
description: A reader has emailed to point out a factual error in a published article. An editor must investigate and, if necessary, issue a correction.

title: 12023_analyze_referral_traffic_sources
description: A social media editor wants to know which platform (Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, etc.) is driving the most traffic to the website.

title: 12024_tag_an_article_for_the_archive
description: After a story is published, an archivist needs to add relevant metadata and tags to it before committing it to the long-term digital archive.

title: 12037_host_a_q&a_on_social_media
description: Following a major investigation, the lead reporter hosts a live Q&A session on Twitter to answer audience questions.

title: 12038_analyze_audience_demographics
description: An editor wants to understand the demographic makeup (age, gender, location) of their website's audience to better tailor content.

title: 12039_repurpose_an_article_as_a_video_script
description: A popular article is being turned into a short video. An editor needs to adapt the text into a script suitable for narration.

title: 12046_create_a_social_video_from_an_article
description: A social media editor needs to create a short, subtitled video for Facebook based on a recently published article.

title: 12055_run_a_poll_on_social_media
description: To engage the audience around a current event, a social media editor decides to run a poll.

title: 12056_identify_a_story_idea_from_online_forums
description: A community manager is monitoring a local online forum and notices many people are complaining about a specific local issue, suggesting a potential story.

title: 12057_analyze_ab_test_results_for_a_headline
description: An A/B test was run on two different headlines for an article. An editor must analyze the results to see which performed better.

title: 12058_create_a_best_of_collection
description: At the end of the year, an editor wants to create a collection of the publication's 10 best investigative reports from that year.

title: 12065_analyze_audience_engagement_funnel
description: An analyst wants to see how many people who see a story on social media actually click the link, and then how long they stay on the page.

title: 12069_create_a_story_highlights_for_instagram
description: An editor wants to create a permanent 'Story Highlight' on the publication's Instagram profile for a major investigative series.

title: 12073_correct_a_misleading_viral_rumor
description: A false rumor about a public figure is spreading rapidly on social media. A journalist must quickly publish a story to debunk it.

title: 12077_analyze_reader_journey_on_the_website
description: An analyst wants to understand the common paths readers take on the website. For example, what article do they often read after reading a story about the mayor?

title: 12081_find_user-generated_content_during_a_breaking_news_event
description: During a breaking news event, a social media editor searches for photos and videos posted by eyewitnesses on social media.

title: 12085_analyze_time_of_day_publication_performance
description: An editor wants to know if articles published in the morning perform better than those published in the evening.

title: 12089_create_a_behind_the_scenes_social_post
description: To build a connection with the audience, a reporter posts a 'behind the scenes' photo or video from their reporting process.

title: 12093_manage_a_live_tv_call-in_segment
description: A producer for a live TV news show must screen callers for a call-in segment with a political analyst.

title: 12001_draft_a_breaking_news_article
description: A major, unexpected event has occurred. A reporter must quickly write a short, accurate article for immediate publication online.

title: 12002_copy_edit_a_feature_story
description: An editor needs to review a long-form feature story for grammar, style, clarity, and adherence to the publication's style guide.

title: 12003_create_a_video_package_from_an_interview
description: A video journalist has a 30-minute interview and needs to edit it down to a 2-minute video package for the web, adding B-roll and graphics.

title: 12004_publish_an_article_to_the_cms
description: An online editor needs to take a finalized article and publish it to the website using the content management system (CMS).

title: 12017_write_a_human-interest_feature
description: A reporter needs to write a long-form feature story about a local hero, focusing on narrative and character development.

title: 12018_check_a_story_for_plagiarism
description: Before publication, an editor must check a freelance submission to ensure it is original work and does not contain plagiarism.

title: 12019_create_an_infographic_from_data
description: A data journalist has a spreadsheet of complex data and needs to create a simple, clear infographic to help readers understand the key findings.

title: 12020_write_alternative_headlines_for_ab_testing
description: An editor wants to test which headline drives more traffic to an article and needs to write several different options.

title: 12033_write_an_obituary
description: A prominent community member has passed away. A reporter must write a respectful and comprehensive obituary.

title: 12034_review_a_restaurant
description: A food critic has visited a new restaurant and needs to write a review, balancing description of the food, atmosphere, and service.

title: 12035_select_photos_for_a_photo_essay
description: A photographer has submitted 200 photos from an event. A photo editor must select the 10-15 best images that tell a cohesive story.

title: 12036_update_a_live_blog
description: During a developing news event (like an election night), an editor must continuously update a live blog with the latest information from reporters.

title: 12045_write_a_script_for_a_podcast
description: A podcast host needs to write a script for an upcoming episode that includes an introduction, interview questions, and an outro.

title: 12051_write_an_explainer_article
description: A complex topic is in the news (e.g., a new piece of legislation). A reporter needs to write an 'explainer' article that breaks it down for a general audience.

title: 12052_headline_and_summary_for_an_external_wire_story
description: An editor needs to take a story from a wire service (like AP or Reuters), write a new headline and summary for it, and publish it on their own site.

title: 12053_create_a_photo_gallery_for_a_website
description: A photo editor needs to create a web-based photo gallery from a recent event.

title: 12054_schedule_a_story_for_later_publication
description: A story is finished and edited, but the editor wants to publish it next morning during peak traffic hours.

title: 12064_edit_audio_for_a_podcast
description: A podcast producer needs to edit a recorded interview, removing mistakes, long pauses, and 'ums' and 'ahs'.

title: 12068_choose_a_pull_quote_for_an_article_layout
description: A print designer needs a 'pull quote' (a short, compelling excerpt) from a feature story to use as a large, graphical element in the layout.

title: 12072_write_a_tv_news_script
description: A broadcast journalist needs to write a 90-second script for the evening news about a city council meeting.

title: 12076_fact-check_a_reporters_draft
description: An editor or dedicated fact-checker must review a reporter's completed draft to verify every factual statement.

title: 12080_write_a_weather_forecast_script
description: A TV meteorologist needs to write a script for their weather segment.

title: 12084_create_a_timeline_graphic
description: For a story that unfolds over a long period, a visuals editor needs to create a timeline graphic to help readers understand the sequence of events.

title: 12088_write_a_film_review
description: A film critic needs to write a review of a new movie.

title: 12092_write_seo-friendly_article
description: A reporter is writing an article on a popular topic and needs to ensure it is optimized to rank well in search engine results.

title: 12096_write_a_year-in-review_article
description: An editor needs to write a major feature article summarizing the most important news events of the past year.

title: 12009_assign_a_breaking_news_story
description: An editor needs to assign a breaking news story to the most appropriate available reporter.

title: 12010_conduct_a_legal_review_of_an_investigative_piece
description: Before publishing a sensitive investigative story that names individuals, an editor must have it reviewed by the legal department for libel risk.

title: 12011_collaborate_on_a_data-driven_story
description: A reporter and a data journalist are collaborating on a story. They need a shared space to work on the data, analysis, and draft.

title: 12012_book_travel_for_an_overseas_assignment
description: A reporter is being sent overseas to cover a conflict and needs flights, a hotel, and a local fixer booked.

title: 12025_pitch_a_story_idea_at_an_editorial_meeting
description: A reporter has an idea for a long-form investigative piece and needs to pitch it to their editors to get it approved.

title: 12026_check_if_a_photo_is_cleared_for_use
description: An editor wants to use a photo found online, but must first verify that the publication has the legal right to use it.

title: 12027_plan_coverage_for_a_major_scheduled_event
description: Editors are planning coverage for the upcoming Olympics. They need to coordinate assignments for multiple reporters and photographers.

title: 12028_request_camera_equipment_from_gear_closet
description: A video journalist needs to check out a specific camera, lens, and microphone for an upcoming shoot.

title: 12040_check_story_against_the_days_news_budget
description: An editor reviews the list of stories planned for the day (the 'news budget') to ensure there is a good mix of topics and no overlap.

title: 12041_handle_a_sources_request_to_be_anonymous
description: A source providing sensitive information will only speak if they are granted anonymity. The reporter must get an editor's approval.

title: 12042_share_files_with_a_freelancer
description: An editor needs to securely share background documents and interview transcripts with a freelance reporter who is not on the internal network.

title: 12043_file_an_expense_report
description: A reporter has returned from an assignment and needs to file an expense report to be reimbursed for travel and food costs.

title: 12059_track_a_reporters_progress_on_a_story
description: An editor needs to check in on a reporter's progress for a long-term story to ensure it is on track to meet its deadline.

title: 12060_anonymize_a_source_in_a_draft
description: A story uses an anonymous source. An editor must ensure the draft does not contain any details that could inadvertently identify the person.

title: 12061_set_up_a_team_meeting
description: An editor needs to schedule a meeting with three reporters and a photo editor to plan upcoming coverage.

title: 12062_arrange_for_a_press_pass
description: A reporter needs a press pass to gain access to a secure event, like a political convention.

title: 12066_decline_a_story_pitch
description: A reporter pitches a story, but the editor decides it is not a good fit for the publication and must decline it constructively.

title: 12070_handle_a_subpoena_for_a_reporters_notes
description: The news organization has received a subpoena from a court demanding a reporter's notes for a story. This must be handled by the legal department.

title: 12074_coordinate_between_a_reporter_and_a_photographer
description: An editor needs to make sure a reporter and a photographer, who are in different locations, meet up at the right time and place for an assignment.

title: 12078_check_for_conflict_of_interest
description: A reporter has been assigned a story about a company. The editor must check if the reporter has any financial or personal conflicts of interest.

title: 12082_archive_a_reporters_notes
description: After a major investigation is published, the reporter's notes and source documents must be securely archived for legal and historical purposes.

title: 12086_handle_an_angry_call_from_a_story_subject
description: A person who was the subject of a critical story calls the newsroom, angry about their portrayal. An editor must handle the call.

title: 12090_update_the_newsrooms_style_guide
description: A new term has entered the public lexicon. A senior editor must decide on the correct spelling and usage and add it to the internal style guide.

title: 12094_plan_for_a_reporters_parental_leave
description: A reporter is going on parental leave for three months. Their editor must plan to reassign their beat and ongoing stories.

title: 11997_researching_a_company_for_an_expose
description: A reporter is starting an investigation into a local company suspected of environmental violations and needs to gather initial background information.

title: 11998_find_an_expert_source_for_a_science_story
description: A reporter is writing about a new medical breakthrough and needs to find a qualified, independent expert to comment on the research.

title: 11999_file_a_freedom_of_information_act_foia_request
description: A journalist needs to obtain government records about a public contract and must file a formal FOIA request.

title: 12000_cover_a_live_press_conference
description: A reporter is covering a live press conference with the mayor and needs to capture key quotes and ask a relevant question.

title: 12013_transcribe_a_recorded_interview
description: A reporter has a one-hour audio recording of an interview and needs a written transcript to pull quotes from.

title: 12014_fact-check_a_politicians_speech
description: A politician has just given a major speech. A fact-checker needs to verify the claims and statistics used in the speech.

title: 12015_cover_a_court_trial
description: A reporter is assigned to cover a high-profile criminal trial and must provide daily updates.

title: 12016_develop_a_story_from_a_press_release
description: A reporter receives a press release about a new product. They must go beyond the release to write an original story.

title: 12029_verify_an_anonymous_tip
description: A reporter receives an anonymous tip about corruption at a government agency. They must try to verify the information before proceeding.

title: 12030_schedule_an_interview_with_a_hostile_source
description: A reporter needs to interview a public figure who is known to be hostile to the press.

title: 12031_analyze_campaign_finance_data
description: A political reporter has a large dataset of campaign contributions and needs to find patterns, such as which industries are donating the most to a candidate.

title: 12032_live-tweet_a_sporting_event
description: A sports reporter is covering a championship game and needs to provide real-time updates and commentary on Twitter.

title: 12044_scrape_data_from_a_government_website
description: A data journalist needs to collect data from a government website that does not offer a downloadable file. They must write a script to scrape the data.

title: 12047_background_a_political_candidate
description: A political reporter is assigned to cover a new candidate running for office and must research their entire public history.

title: 12048_conduct_an_off-the-record_briefing
description: A source is willing to provide background information to help a reporter understand a complex topic, but does not want to be quoted. The reporter must conduct an 'off-the-record' briefing.

title: 12049_verify_a_viral_social_media_video
description: A dramatic video of an event is going viral. A reporter must verify its authenticity before reporting on it.

title: 12050_report_from_a_natural_disaster_zone
description: A reporter is sent to cover a hurricane's aftermath. They must report on the damage and the human impact while dealing with difficult conditions.

title: 12063_find_a_case_study_for_a_trend_story
description: A reporter is writing about a national economic trend (e.g., inflation) and needs to find a local person or family to serve as a case study.

title: 12067_prepare_for_an_interview
description: A reporter is about to conduct a major interview and needs to prepare a thorough list of questions and background materials.

title: 12071_cover_an_election_night
description: A political reporter is responsible for covering election results as they come in.

title: 12075_find_a_persons_contact_information
description: A reporter needs to find a phone number or email for a private citizen they want to interview.

title: 12079_follow_a_money_trail
description: A reporter is investigating a politician and wants to follow a money trail from a government contract to the politician's personal finances.

title: 12083_cover_a_protest
description: A reporter is sent to cover a protest. They need to report on the size of the crowd, their message, and any interactions with counter-protesters or police.

title: 12087_develop_story_idea_from_public_data
description: A data journalist browses a city's open data portal looking for potential stories.

title: 12091_verify_authenticity_of_a_leaked_document
description: A reporter receives a supposedly leaked document. They must take steps to verify it is real before reporting on it.

title: 12095_go_undercover_for_a_story
description: For a major investigation, a reporter needs to go undercover (e.g., get a job at a company) to expose wrongdoing. This requires extensive planning and ethical review.

description: A customer who recently applied for a mortgage wants to know the status of their application.

title: 11250_change_investment_strategy
description: A client's risk tolerance has decreased, and they want to move from a 'Growth' to a 'Balanced' investment strategy.

title: 11251_request_required_minimum_distribution
description: A client of retirement age needs to take their annual RMD from their IRA.

title: 11252_correct_trade_error
description: A trade was executed in the wrong client account by mistake and needs to be corrected.

title: 11253_close_wealth_account
description: A client is transferring their assets to another institution and wants to close their account.

title: 11254_open_commercial_line_of_credit
description: A corporate client needs to open a line of credit to manage working capital.

title: 11255_model_scenario_analysis
description: An FP&A analyst needs to model the impact of a potential recession (e.g., a 10% drop in sales) on the company's financial plan.

title: 11256_review_employee_expense_report
description: A compliance officer is reviewing an employee's expense report for any violations of company policy.

title: 11257_file_annual_report
description: The reporting team is ready to file the company's annual 10-K report with the SEC.

title: 11258_change_statement_delivery
description: A customer wants to stop receiving paper statements in the mail and switch to e-statements.

title: 11259_unblock_card_after_fraud_alert
description: A customer's card was blocked due to a suspected fraudulent transaction which the customer confirms was legitimate.

title: 11260_inquiry_about_incoming_wire
description: A customer is expecting an incoming wire transfer and wants to know if it has arrived.

title: 11261_request_mortgage_escrow_analysis
description: A customer's property taxes have increased, and they want to understand how this will affect their monthly mortgage payment.

title: 11262_set_up_automated_investing
description: A client wants to set up an automatic monthly investment from their bank account into their portfolio.

title: 11263_exercise_stock_options
description: A client wants to exercise their vested employee stock options and sell the shares immediately (a 'cashless' exercise).

title: 11264_open_custodial_account
description: A client wants to open an investment account for their minor child.

title: 11265_plan_for_inheritance
description: A client is expecting to receive a large inheritance and wants advice on how to manage it.

title: 11266_manage_investment_in_letter_of_credit
description: A corporate client needs to issue a standby letter of credit (L/C) to a supplier as a guarantee of payment.

title: 11267_analyze_profitability_by_product
description: An FP&A analyst needs to determine which of the company's products are the most and least profitable.

title: 11268_update_insider_trading_list
description: A compliance officer needs to add a new executive to the company's insider trading list, restricting when they can trade company stock.

title: 11269_reconcile_bank_statement
description: An accountant needs to perform the monthly bank reconciliation, matching transactions in the general ledger to the bank statement.

title: 11270_add_joint_owner_to_account
description: A customer wants to add their spouse as a joint owner with rights of survivorship to their checking account.

title: 11271_dispute_credit_report_error
description: A customer has found an error on their credit report that originates from their account with the bank and wants it corrected.

title: 11272_setup_external_account_transfer
description: A customer wants to link an account from another bank to be able to transfer funds.

title: 11273_refinance_auto_loan
description: A customer wants to refinance their existing auto loan from another lender to get a lower interest rate.

title: 11274_consolidate_retirement_accounts
description: A new client wants to roll over an old 401(k) from a previous employer into a new IRA.

title: 11275_provide_proof_of_funds_letter
description: A client is buying a house and needs an official letter from the firm confirming they have sufficient funds for the purchase.

title: 11276_change_account_risk_profile
description: A client has received a promotion and wants to increase their risk tolerance from 'Balanced' to 'Growth'.

title: 11277_analyze_estate_plan
description: A client wants a review of their current estate plan to ensure it meets their goals and is tax-efficient.

title: 11278_draw_on_line_of_credit
description: A corporate client needs to draw $100,000 from their commercial line of credit to cover a temporary cash shortfall.

title: 11279_create_board_of_directors_report
description: An FP&A director needs to create the financial package for the upcoming quarterly board of directors meeting.

title: 11280_manage_data_retention_policy
description: A compliance officer needs to ensure that financial records older than the 7-year retention policy are being properly archived or disposed of.

title: 11281_write_off_bad_debt
description: An accountant needs to write off an accounts receivable balance for a customer who has gone bankrupt.

title: 11282_waive_monthly_account_fee
description: A long-time customer requests to have their monthly maintenance fee waived after their balance temporarily dropped below the minimum.

title: 11283_verify_check_deposit
description: A customer has deposited a large, out-of-state check, and the bank needs to place a hold on the funds for verification.

title: 11284_resolve_incorrect_bill_payment
description: A customer used bill pay to send money to a utility company, but entered the wrong account number and the payment was not credited.

title: 11285_provide_loan_amortization_schedule
description: A customer wants to see a full amortization schedule for their auto loan.

title: 11286_review_asset_allocation
description: An advisor is conducting an annual review and needs to check if a client's portfolio allocation is aligned with their goals.

title: 11287_place_gTC_trade_order
description: A client wants to place a limit order to buy a stock, but wants the order to remain active until it's either filled or they cancel it.

title: 11288_add_trusted_contact
description: A senior client wants to add their adult child as a trusted contact on their account for added security.

title: 11289_charitable_giving_plan
description: A client wants to donate appreciated stock to a charity to be more tax-efficient.

title: 11290_manage_commercial_card_program
description: A corporate administrator needs to issue a new commercial credit card to an employee and set their spending limits.

title: 11291_capital_expenditure_request
description: The FP&A team needs to analyze a request from the operations department to purchase a new piece of machinery for $500,000.

title: 11292_respond_to_regulatory_inquiry
description: A financial regulator has sent an inquiry requesting trade data for a specific time period.

title: 11293_manage_accruals
description: An accountant needs to create an accrual journal entry for expenses that have been incurred but not yet invoiced.

title: 11294_open_certificate_of_deposit
description: A customer wants to open a 12-month CD with $10,000.

title: 11295_resolve_debit_card_dispute
description: A customer disputes a transaction. After an initial investigation, the bank issues a provisional credit while the full investigation continues.

title: 11296_zelle_payment_inquiry
description: A customer sent a Zelle payment to a friend, but the friend claims they never received it.

title: 11297_subordinate_mortgage_lien
description: A customer is refinancing their first mortgage with another lender and needs the bank to subordinate its second mortgage (HELOC) to the new first mortgage.

title: loan_approval_risk_check
description: An agent evaluates a loan application for a high-risk customer.

title: 11103_der_onboarding
description: A customer with an existing rooftop solar and battery system wants to enroll in the company's Virtual Power Plant (VPP) program.

title: 11107_ev_charging_billing_dispute
description: A customer claims they were overcharged for a public EV charging session.

title: 11111_energy_efficiency_audit
description: An energy consultant is preparing a preliminary energy efficiency report for a commercial office building.

title: 11115_demand_response_event_dispatch
description: A VPP operator receives a request from the grid operator to curtail 5 MW of load in a specific zone for 2 hours.

title: 11119_vpp_performance_report
description: A VPP program manager needs a monthly performance and revenue report for a portfolio of residential batteries.

title: 11123_optimize_ev_fleet_charging
description: A fleet manager needs to create a charging schedule for 50 electric delivery vans to minimize electricity costs while ensuring all vehicles are fully charged by 6 AM.

title: 11127_propose_solar_plus_storage
description: A sales agent is creating a proposal for a commercial customer for a rooftop solar and battery storage system.

title: 11131_home_energy_report_generation
description: An agent needs to automatically generate a personalized monthly energy report for a residential customer with rooftop solar.

title: 11135_der_program_eligibility_check
description: A customer is interested in a new battery program. The agent must check if they are eligible based on their location and existing utility service.

title: 11139_smart_thermostat_optimization
description: During a heatwave, a VPP operator needs to use a fleet of smart thermostats to pre-cool homes before a demand response event.

title: 11143_community_solar_subscription
description: A residential customer wants to sign up for a local community solar program to support renewable energy and receive bill credits.

title: 11147_ev_charger_site_selection
description: A business development manager needs to identify the best locations to install new public DC fast chargers.

title: 11151_analyze_tou_rate_switch
description: A customer on a flat electricity rate wants to know if they would save money by switching to a Time-of-Use (TOU) rate.

title: 11155_v2g_pilot_program_analysis
description: An innovation manager is analyzing data from a V2G pilot program to assess its effectiveness and potential for expansion.

title: 11159_green_hydrogen_feasibility
description: An industrial customer wants to explore the feasibility of producing green hydrogen on-site using a dedicated solar farm and electrolyzer.

title: 11163_microgrid_resilience_analysis
description: A hospital facility manager wants to assess how long their new microgrid (solar + battery + diesel generator) can power their critical loads during a grid outage.

title: 11167_fleet_electrification_analysis
description: A corporate client wants to know the TCO of replacing their fleet of 100 diesel delivery vans with electric equivalents.

title: 11171_demand_response_settlement
description: After a demand response event, a program manager needs to calculate the performance and payments for participating customers.

title: 11175_renewable_natural_gas_sourcing
description: A large industrial customer wants to source Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) to reduce the carbon footprint of their thermal processes.

title: 11179_carbon_accounting_report
description: A sustainability consultant is preparing a carbon accounting report for a client, covering their Scope 2 emissions from purchased electricity.

title: 11183_ev_managed_charging_enrollment
description: A customer with a new electric vehicle wants to enroll in a program where the utility manages their charging to occur during off-peak hours in exchange for a lower rate.

title: 11187_industrial_electrification_study
description: An industrial customer wants to replace their natural gas-fired process heaters with electric alternatives to decarbonize.

title: 11191_heat_pump_adoption_analysis
description: A utility's electrification program manager wants to identify customers who would be good candidates for switching from a gas furnace to an electric heat pump.

title: 11195_analyze_building_electrification_impact
description: A distribution planner needs to forecast the grid impact of a city's policy to ban natural gas in new construction, leading to all-electric homes.

title: 11102_wind_turbine_fault_diagnosis
description: An operations manager receives an alert for a wind turbine producing 15% less power than expected given current wind speeds. The agent must diagnose the potential cause.

title: 11106_solar_generation_forecast
description: An operator needs an accurate 48-hour power generation forecast for a 100 MW solar farm.

title: 11110_battery_dispatch_optimization
description: An operator needs to create an optimal charge/discharge schedule for a 50 MW / 200 MWh battery system for the next 24 hours to maximize revenue from energy arbitrage.

title: 11114_preventive_maintenance_scheduling
description: An operations planner needs to schedule the annual preventive maintenance for a portfolio of solar farms, minimizing production loss.

title: 11118_grid_curtailment_analysis
description: A solar farm was curtailed by the grid operator. An analyst needs to verify the reason and calculate the financial impact.

title: 10713_grc_policy_update
description: A GRC analyst must update the corporate password policy to meet a new compliance framework's requirements (e.g., increasing minimum length).

title: 10714_grc_risk_assessment_new_vendor
description: A GRC analyst must conduct a security risk assessment of a new SaaS vendor that will handle sensitive customer data.

title: 10715_grc_compliance_audit_pci
description: A GRC analyst must gather evidence to demonstrate compliance with a specific PCI DSS requirement for an upcoming audit.

title: 10716_grc_security_awareness_phishing_test
description: A security awareness manager must conduct a simulated phishing campaign to test employee vigilance.

title: 10717_secops_incident_triage_phishing_report
description: A SOC analyst receives an email reported by a user as suspicious and must determine if it is malicious.

title: 10718_secops_threat_hunting_powershell
description: A threat hunter suspects an attacker is using obfuscated PowerShell commands for 'living off the land'. They must search command line logs for evidence.

title: 10719_secops_containment_account_compromise
description: An alert indicates a user account is logging in from two different countries simultaneously. An incident responder must contain the compromised account.

title: 10720_secops_forensics_network_pcap
description: An investigator must analyze a network packet capture (PCAP) file from a compromised host to identify the attacker's command-and-control (C2) channel.

title: 10721_vuln_mgmt_scanning_network_segment
description: A vulnerability analyst must perform the quarterly authenticated vulnerability scan of the company's DMZ network segment.

title: 10722_vuln_mgmt_pen_test_physical
description: A penetration tester is tasked with gaining unauthorized physical access to a corporate office building to test security controls.

title: 10723_vuln_mgmt_patching_workstations
description: An analyst must deploy the latest 'Patch Tuesday' security updates to all corporate workstations.

title: 10724_vuln_mgmt_threat_intel_phishing_kit
description: A threat intelligence analyst discovers a new phishing kit being sold on a dark web forum and must analyze it to develop countermeasures.

title: 10725_iam_user_deprovisioning
description: An IAM analyst must immediately deprovision all access for an employee who has been terminated.

title: 10726_iam_auth_sso_failure
description: The company's Single Sign-On (SSO) provider is having an outage, preventing all users from logging into cloud applications. An analyst must manage the incident.

title: 10727_iam_pam_session_monitoring
description: A security analyst must review a recorded session of a contractor who used a privileged account to access a critical server.

title: 10728_iam_governance_role_creation
description: A new project requires a new access role to be created that combines permissions from multiple applications. An IAM analyst must design and create the role.

title: 10729_grc_policy_exception_request
description: A developer requests a temporary exception to the security policy that blocks outbound traffic so they can connect to a new third-party API for testing.

title: 10730_grc_risk_assessment_system
description: A GRC analyst must perform a security risk assessment on a legacy, business-critical application that cannot be easily patched.

title: 10731_grc_compliance_audit_gdpr
description: A GRC analyst must audit the process for handling 'right to be forgotten' requests to ensure compliance with GDPR.

title: 10732_grc_security_awareness_new_hire
description: A security awareness manager must ensure all new hires complete their mandatory security awareness training within 30 days of starting.

title: 10733_secops_incident_triage_ids
description: A SOC analyst receives an alert from a network Intrusion Detection System (IDS) for a potential SQL injection attempt against a web server.

title: 10734_secops_threat_hunting_lateral_movement
description: A threat hunter is looking for signs of lateral movement by searching for suspicious use of administrative tools like PsExec.

title: 10735_secops_eradication_malware
description: Following a malware outbreak, an incident responder must ensure the malware is completely removed from all affected systems.

title: 10736_secops_forensics_memory_analysis
description: An investigator suspects a host is compromised with fileless malware living only in memory. They must perform a memory analysis.

title: 10737_vuln_mgmt_scanning_code_repo
description: An analyst must configure a Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tool to automatically scan a source code repository for vulnerabilities on every new commit.

title: 10738_vuln_mgmt_pen_test_social_engineering
description: A penetration tester is tasked with gaining a user's password through a vishing (voice phishing) phone call.

title: 10739_vuln_mgmt_patching_third_party
description: A vulnerability is discovered in a widely used third-party library (e.g., Log4j). An analyst must find all applications using the library and coordinate patching.

title: 10740_vuln_mgmt_threat_intel_adversary_ttp
description: A threat intelligence analyst is researching a specific adversary group to understand their tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs).

title: 10741_iam_user_provisioning_contractor
description: An IAM analyst must provision a temporary account for a contractor with access that automatically expires at the end of their contract.

title: 10742_iam_auth_password_policy_enforcement
description: An analyst must configure the domain controller to enforce a new, stronger password policy.

title: 10743_iam_pam_service_account
description: An analyst must onboard a new application's service account into the PAM tool to enable automatic password rotation.

title: 10744_iam_governance_toxic_combinations
description: An analyst must create a Separation of Duties (SoD) policy in the IGA tool to prevent a single user from having two conflicting permissions (e.g., creating a vendor and approving a payment).

title: 10745_grc_policy_acceptable_use
description: A GRC analyst must conduct the annual review of the Acceptable Use Policy (AUP) and require all employees to re-acknowledge it.

title: 10746_grc_risk_assessment_data_classification
description: A GRC analyst discovers a database containing sensitive PII that is incorrectly classified as 'Public'. They must perform a risk assessment.

title: 10747_grc_compliance_audit_hipaa
description: An analyst must audit access logs for a database containing patient data to ensure only authorized medical personnel have accessed it.

title: 10748_grc_security_awareness_role_based
description: A security awareness manager needs to assign specialized, role-based training to different departments.

title: 10749_secops_incident_triage_waf
description: A SOC analyst receives an alert from the Web Application Firewall (WAF) for a cross-site scripting (XSS) attempt.

title: 10750_secops_threat_hunting_new_service
description: A threat hunter is looking for malware persistence by searching for newly created, unauthorized services on workstations.

title: 10751_secops_containment_data_leak
description: A Data Loss Prevention (DLP) tool alerts that a file containing sensitive data has been uploaded to a public cloud storage site.

title: 10752_secops_forensics_log_analysis
description: An investigator must analyze logs from multiple systems (AD, VPN, O365) to create a timeline of an account compromise.

title: 10753_vuln_mgmt_scanning_container
description: An analyst must scan a new Docker container image for known vulnerabilities in its OS packages and libraries before it can be deployed to production.

title: 10754_vuln_mgmt_pen_test_wifi
description: A penetration tester is tasked with cracking the password for the corporate guest Wi-Fi network.

title: 10755_vuln_mgmt_patching_database
description: An analyst must apply a critical security patch to a production database server, which requires downtime.

title: 10756_vuln_mgmt_threat_intel_cve
description: A new critical CVE is announced. A threat intelligence analyst must determine its relevance and risk to the organization.

title: 10757_iam_user_provisioning_role_change
description: An employee is moving from the Sales department to the Finance department. An IAM analyst must update their access accordingly.

title: 10758_iam_auth_access_denied
description: A user is reporting they are receiving an 'Access Denied' error when trying to access a folder they believe they should have access to.

title: 10759_iam_pam_emergency_access
description: A critical system is down, and the normal administrator is unavailable. A different administrator needs emergency 'break glass' access to fix it.

title: 10760_iam_governance_orphan_accounts
description: An analyst must run a report to find 'orphaned' accounts (accounts that are not associated with a current employee) and disable them.

title: 10761_grc_policy_creation_cloud
description: As the company moves to the cloud, a GRC analyst must create a new Cloud Security Policy from scratch.

title: 10762_grc_risk_assessment_project
description: A GRC analyst must conduct a security risk assessment for a new internal project to develop a mobile application.

title: 10763_grc_compliance_audit_sox
description: An analyst must test IT General Controls (ITGCs) for a Sarbanes-Oxley (SOX) audit, specifically focusing on change management.

title: 10764_grc_security_awareness_executive
description: A security awareness manager must prepare and deliver a threat briefing to the company's executive leadership team.

title: 10765_secops_incident_triage_insider
description: A SOC analyst receives an alert from a User and Entity Behavior Analytics (UEBA) tool that a user has downloaded an unusually large amount of data.

title: 10766_secops_threat_hunting_command_line
description: A threat hunter is searching for suspicious command line arguments that might indicate malicious activity.

title: 10767_secops_containment_malicious_domain
description: Threat intelligence indicates a domain is being used to host malware. An incident responder must block access to it.

title: 10768_secops_forensics_mobile_app
description: An investigator must perform a forensic analysis of a suspicious Android application (APK file).

title: 10769_vuln_mgmt_scanning_cloud
description: An analyst must run a Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) scan to find misconfigurations in the company's AWS environment.

title: 10770_vuln_mgmt_pen_test_api
description: A penetration tester is tasked with finding security flaws in a new REST API.

title: 10771_vuln_mgmt_patching_rebootless
description: An analyst must apply a critical vulnerability patch to the Linux kernel on hundreds of production servers without rebooting them.

title: 10772_vuln_mgmt_threat_intel_report_generation
description: A threat intelligence analyst must prepare the weekly threat briefing for the CISO and security leadership.

title: 10773_iam_user_provisioning_rehire
description: An employee who left the company six months ago is rehired. An IAM analyst must re-enable their old account and provision new access.

title: 10774_iam_auth_certificate
description: A user is unable to access a secure internal website because their client certificate has expired.

title: 10775_iam_pam_api_key_rotation
description: An analyst must rotate the secret API key for a critical service that integrates with a third-party vendor.

title: 10776_iam_governance_dormant_accounts
description: An analyst must run a quarterly report to find accounts that have not been used for over 90 days and disable them.

title: 10777_grc_policy_violation_investigation
description: A DLP tool flags an employee for attempting to email a sensitive document to their personal email address, violating policy. A GRC analyst must investigate.

title: 10778_grc_risk_assessment_third_party
description: A third-party vendor announces they have suffered a data breach. A GRC analyst must assess the risk to their own company.

title: 10779_grc_compliance_audit_evidence_collection
description: An analyst must configure a GRC tool to automatically collect evidence for a compliance audit.

title: 10780_grc_security_awareness_reporting
description: A manager must create a dashboard to report on the effectiveness of the security awareness program to leadership.

title: 10781_secops_incident_triage_impossible_travel
description: A SOC analyst receives an alert that a user has logged in from India and Brazil within 5 minutes. The analyst must triage this 'impossible travel' alert.

title: 10782_secops_threat_hunting_scheduled_tasks
description: A threat hunter is looking for malware persistence established via scheduled tasks.

title: 10783_secops_containment_rogue_device
description: A network access control (NAC) system alerts that an unauthorized device (e.g., a personal laptop) has connected to a corporate network port.

title: 10784_secops_forensics_timeline_analysis
description: An investigator must create a master timeline of an entire security breach by combining artifacts from disk, memory, and network forensics.

title: 10785_vuln_mgmt_scanning_iot
description: An analyst must assess the security of a new IoT device (e.g., a smart camera) before it is approved for corporate use.

title: 10786_vuln_mgmt_pen_test_red_team
description: A red team is tasked with simulating a real-world adversary by attempting to breach the company and achieve a specific objective (e.g., access the CEO's email) without being detected.

title: 10787_vuln_mgmt_patching_virtual
description: A critical vulnerability is found in a legacy web application that cannot be immediately patched. An analyst must apply a 'virtual patch' using a Web Application Firewall (WAF).

title: 10788_vuln_mgmt_threat_intel_dark_web
description: A threat intelligence analyst is monitoring dark web markets for stolen company credentials.

title: 10789_iam_user_provisioning_bulk
description: An IAM analyst must provision accounts for a class of 50 new summer interns.

title: 10790_iam_auth_passwordless
description: An analyst is rolling out passwordless authentication (e.g., using FIDO2 security keys) to a pilot group of users.

title: 10791_iam_pam_ssh_key_management
description: An analyst must onboard a developer's SSH key into a PAM system to provide audited, temporary access to a production server.

title: 10792_iam_governance_access_request
description: A user requests access to a new application. The request must go through a formal approval workflow.

title: 10793_grc_policy_framework_mapping
description: A GRC analyst must map the company's internal security controls to a new compliance framework (e.g., ISO 27001).

title: 10794_grc_risk_assessment_quantitative
description: An analyst must perform a quantitative risk assessment for a potential data breach, calculating the potential financial loss.

title: 10795_grc_compliance_audit_cjis
description: An analyst for a police department must audit their systems to ensure compliance with the FBI's Criminal Justice Information Services (CJIS) security policy.

title: 10796_grc_security_awareness_gamification
description: A manager wants to increase engagement with the security awareness program by implementing gamification.

title: 10797_secops_incident_triage_threat_intel
description: A SOC analyst receives an EDR alert for a file with a specific hash. The analyst must use threat intelligence to triage it.

title: 10798_vuln_mgmt_pen_test_assumed_breach
description: A penetration tester is given a standard user account and tasked with seeing if they can achieve a specific objective, simulating an attacker who has already stolen credentials.

title: 10799_iam_governance_entitlement_creep
description: An access review reveals a long-term employee has accumulated access from multiple previous roles that they no longer need ('entitlement creep'). An analyst must remediate this.

title: 10800_grc_risk_assessment_merger
description: A GRC analyst must perform a high-level cybersecurity risk assessment of a company that is being acquired.

title: 00001_process_po_invoice
